description: 25 real-world IT office scenarios for embedding backend comparison

cases.title: Account locked after failed logins
cases.description: I entered the wrong password five times and now my Active Directory account is locked. I need to unlock it to access email and Teams.

cases.title: Printer out of toner on 4th floor
cases.description: The HP LaserJet on the 4th floor shows replace toner cartridge and stopped printing my expense reports.

cases.title: Production API key in Slack channel
cases.description: A teammate accidentally pasted our production Stripe API secret key into a public Slack channel. Need immediate security response.

cases.title: Cannot connect to corporate VPN
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect shows Error 807 when connecting from home WiFi. Worked fine yesterday.

cases.title: Outlook not syncing new emails
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook on my laptop stopped receiving new mail since this morning. Webmail works but desktop client is stuck on yesterday.

cases.title: Teams microphone not detected
cases.description: In Microsoft Teams calls nobody can hear me. Microphone works in Zoom but Teams shows no input device after Windows update.

cases.title: SharePoint document library access denied
cases.description: I get access denied when opening our finance team SharePoint document library. My manager says I should have contributor rights.

cases.title: Laptop stuck on blue screen
cases.description: Company Dell laptop shows blue screen STOP code on boot loop after installing a driver. Cannot reach login screen.

cases.title: External monitor flickering
cases.description: Dual monitor setup — the Dell USB-C dock flickers the external display every few seconds. Laptop screen is fine.

cases.title: Docking station USB ports dead
cases.description: Thunderbolt dock powers the laptop but none of the USB ports or Ethernet on the dock work anymore.

cases.title: Corporate WiFi certificate warning
cases.description: Connecting to CORP-WIFI shows untrusted certificate warning on my MacBook. Cannot join wireless on floor 8.

cases.title: Production SQL query timeout
cases.description: Critical reporting query against production SQL Server times out after 30 seconds. Started after weekend index rebuild.

cases.title: Oracle connection pool exhausted
cases.description: Java app cannot get Oracle DB connections — ORA-12519 TNS:no appropriate service handler. Batch jobs failing overnight.

cases.title: NAS backup job failed
cases.description: NetApp NAS nightly backup failed with quota exceeded on the finance share. Need storage team to expand or purge.

cases.title: Clicked suspicious payroll email
cases.description: I clicked a link in a fake payroll email and entered my credentials on a suspicious page. Need security incident help.

cases.title: Lost phone with authenticator app
cases.description: Lost my iPhone with Microsoft Authenticator MFA. Cannot sign into O365 portal without resetting MFA registration.

cases.title: New hire laptop request
cases.description: New analyst starts Monday — need a standard Windows laptop imaged with VPN, Office, and department software provisioned.

cases.title: Request Adobe Acrobat Pro install
cases.description: Need Adobe Acrobat Pro installed on my workstation for contract PDF editing. Standard user cannot install from Software Center.

cases.title: Chrome extensions blocked
cases.description: Google Chrome blocks all extensions after policy update. I need an approved password manager extension for daily work.

cases.title: Windows Update stuck at 35%
cases.description: Company laptop stuck on Windows Update 35% for three hours. Restarted twice, same issue.

cases.title: AirPods won't pair with MacBook
cases.description: Bluetooth AirPods disconnect constantly from my MacBook Pro in open office. Other Bluetooth devices work intermittently.

cases.title: Citrix session freezes
cases.description: Citrix Workspace session freezes every 10 minutes when using the finance ERP app. Local apps are fine.

cases.title: Zscaler blocking internal site
cases.description: Zscaler proxy blocks our internal Jenkins CI URL with policy violation. Builds failing for whole dev team.

cases.title: SAP portal password expired
cases.description: SAP Fiori portal says password expired and self-service reset link sends me to an error page. Cannot submit timesheets.

cases.title: Slack desktop notifications broken
cases.description: Slack desktop app on Windows no longer shows notifications or badge counts. Reinstall did not help.
